articles.title: SpaceX Starship could slash travel time to Uranus in half
articles.title_tr: SpaceX Starship could slash travel time to Uranus in half
articles.summary: A new concept suggests SpaceX’s Starship could revolutionize a future mission to Uranus, one of the solar system’s most overlooked planets. By refueling in orbit and helping slow the spacecraft on arrival, it could cut travel time nearly in half. That’s a big deal for a mission that would otherwise take over a decade just to arrive. If it works, it could finally open the door to studying this strange, tilted world up close.

articles.title: Bursa'da hafta sonu hava nasıl olacak? Dışarı çıkacaklar dikkat! (3 Nisan 2026 Hava Durumu)
articles.title_tr: Bursa'da hafta sonu hava nasıl olacak? Dışarı çıkacaklar dikkat! (3 Nisan 2026 Hava Durumu)
articles.summary:
Bursa’da 3 Nisan 2026 Cuma günü hava nasıl olacak? Gün boyu kuvvetli sağanak yağış beklenirken, akşam saatlerinde havanın nasıl değişeceği merak konusu. Detaylar haberimizde…Meteoroloji Genel Müdürlüğü’nün son tahminlerine göre Bursa’da gün boyunca kuvvetli sağanak yağış etkili olacak. Akşam saatlerine doğru ise yağışın yerini bulutlu hava alacak. Kentte sıcaklıkların gün içinde 19 dereceye kadar yükselmesi, gece saatlerinde ise 12 derece civarında seyretmesi bekleniyor. İşte Bursa için güncel hava durumu…

Meteoroloji Genel Müdürlüğü’nün yayımladığı son tahmin raporuna göre Bursa’da gün boyunca kuvvetli sağanak yağışın etkili olması bekleniyor.

Akşam saatlerine doğru ise yağışın yerini bulutlu bir havanın alacağı tahmin ediliyor.

articles.title: Scientists say BMI gets it wrong for over one third of adults
articles.title_tr: Scientists say BMI gets it wrong for over one third of adults
articles.summary: A new study suggests that one of the most widely used health metrics, BMI, may be getting it wrong for a large portion of the population. By comparing BMI classifications with precise body fat measurements using advanced DXA scans, researchers found that more than one-third of adults were placed in incorrect weight categories. Many people labeled as overweight or obese did not actually have the corresponding body fat levels, while others were missed entirely.

articles.summary: The Super Mario Galaxy movie is primed for a predictably massive opening weekend despite mixed reviews, but the biggest surprise may be the non-Mario characters who make an appearance. Just ahead of the film's opening Nintendo revealed that Fox McCloud appears alongside all the Mushroom Kingdom denizens. If all that fancy flying puts you or your kids in the mood to explore the Star Fox oeuvre, we're here to help.Star Fox is a traditional on-rails space shooter starring a team of anthropomorphic starfighter pilots. The team itself is called Star Fox, and Fox McCloud is the team leader. The other pilots--in most games, Peppy, Falco, and Slippy--are your wingmen. The series debuted on the Super NES in 1993, showing off rudimentary but at-the-time mind-blowing 3D effects. So should you track down the original Star Fox and get shooting? Not necessarily.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Study finds dangerous lead levels in children’s clothing
articles.title_tr: Study finds dangerous lead levels in children’s clothing
articles.summary: Fast fashion might come with a hidden danger: lead. Researchers testing children’s shirts from multiple retailers found every sample exceeded U.S. safety limits, raising concerns about toxic exposure—especially since young kids often chew on clothing. Brightly colored fabrics like red and yellow showed particularly high levels, likely due to chemicals used to fix dyes. Simulations suggest that even brief mouthing could expose children to unsafe amounts of lead, a substance known to harm brain development and behavior.

articles.title: New microwave frying technique could make french fries much healthier
articles.title_tr: New microwave frying technique could make french fries much healthier
articles.summary: Scientists have discovered a way to make French fries less greasy without ruining their taste. By combining regular frying with microwave heating, they reduce the amount of oil absorbed during cooking. The key lies in pressure inside the food—microwaves help push oil out instead of letting it seep in. The result: faster cooking, lower fat, and fries that can still stay crispy.

articles.title: After Peak's Success, Its Devs Face Burnout and Big Decisions
articles.title_tr: After Peak's Success, Its Devs Face Burnout and Big Decisions
articles.summary: Change often leaves indie developers balancing their own creative plans with what players expect after a hit. Success, especially sudden success, can reshape a studio's future overnight.Players now expect ongoing updates, long-term support, and clear roadmaps. But even at the highest level, that model is difficult to sustain. Recent layoffs at Epic Games, the company behind Fortnite, highlighted how demanding live support has become. The tension between long-term vision and player demand is becoming harder to manage. Indie teams face similar pressure without the same resources.Aggro Crab, the studio behind Peak, is one such team. However, the studio's legacy didn't start with a live-service title; instead it began with a comedic-yet-brutal soul like: Another Crab's Treasure. The title was a commercial and critical success, elevating the studio to new heights. But after finishing Another Crab's Treasure back in 2024, Aggro Crab's small team was exhausted. The three-year project left everyone drained.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: The Best Nintendo Switch & Switch 2 Deals This Week - April 2, 2026
articles.title_tr: The Best Nintendo Switch & Switch 2 Deals This Week - April 2, 2026
articles.summary: Several popular Switch 2 games are available for cheap right now, making this a wonderful time to start building out your library. This includes RPG hits like Octopath Traveler 0, casual farming games like Story of Seasons: Grand Bazaar, and the sci-fi horror of Cronos. Console deals this week are a bit harder to come by. Woot was running a flash sale offering the Switch 2 for just $400, but it sold out quickly. That means your best bet is still a full-priced unit from your typical retailers. However, there are a few fun accessories on sale, so if you're looking for some new gear, there's still a chance to cash in on great price cuts this week.Ready to get shopping? Preorders are also open for The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Steelbook on 4K Blu-ray, which is priced at $38. Give it a look if you want to add it to your collection as soon as possible--and don't want to worry about this unique steelbook selling out.Nintendo Switch Game DealsThere are a bunch of excellent Switch 2 game deals this week. Assassin's Creed Shadows is still cheap at $38.75 (was $60). You'll also find Octopath Traveler 0 at its lowest price ever ($40, was $50), which our review gave an 8/10 for its deep customization options and a nice balance between relaxed town-building and intense combat. If you're glad it's finally spring, check out Story of Seasons: Grand Bazaar to run your own farm and explore small-town living. It's only seeing a slight discount to $40 (was $50), but this is the best price we've seen for it on Switch 2.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Cuma namazı kılınışı
articles.title_tr: Cuma namazı kılınışı
articles.summary: Cuma namazına sayılı saatler kala, cuma namazı kılınışı gündemi meşgul eden konular arasında yer aldı. Cuma namazı, dördü ilk sünnet, ikisi farz ve dördü de son sünnet olmak üzere on rekât olarak eda edilmektedir. Cuma namazı, öğle saatlerinde, camide cemaatle kılınmaktadır. Peki, "Cuma namazı nasıl kılınır, kaç rekattır?" İşte Diyanet ile adım adım cuma namazı kılınışı...
